creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
scheidell    2012-02-09 17:21:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/fusefs-exfat Makefile 
    sysutils/fusefs-exfat/files patch-libexfat_io.c 
  Added files:
    sysutils/fusefs-exfat/files patch-timefuncs 
  Log:
  - Fixed time/date handling, fix taken from upstream
  - Device block size is now requested from the device
  - Added optional ublio support, enabled by default
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/164790
  Submitted by:   Alex Samorukov<samm@os2.kiev.ua>  (maintainer)
  Approved by:    gabor (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +19 -3     ports/sysutils/fusefs-exfat/Makefile
  1.2       +97 -18    ports/sysutils/fusefs-exfat/files/patch-libexfat_io.c
  1.1       +384 -0    ports/sysutils/fusefs-exfat/files/patch-timefuncs (new)
